action: Identified and fixed systemic WORKSPACE_ROOT detection bug — MCP server resolved workspace as ~/bin regardless of which VS Code workspace was open because (1) extension never passed GSH_WORKSPACE_ROOTS env var and (2) git-research-mcp computed WORKSPACE_ROOT statically from process.cwd()/\_\_dirname at module load
outcome: Fixed: extension now passes GSH_WORKSPACE_ROOTS from vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders, fires changeEmitter on folder changes to restart server, and git-research-mcp reads env var first. All knowledge, session memory, and checkpoint tools now resolve to correct workspace.
context: Bug discovered when AudioStuff workspace called workspace_context and got ~/bin data. Root cause: env var never passed + static computation at module load. Affected: workspace_context, checkpoint, all knowledge tools, session memory tools.

action: starting investigation: why research files were saved to repo root instead of project knowledge location
context: User observed research files saved to root directory. Need determine whether root-level files are intentional for this repo or caused by workspace resolution bug.

action: investigated root-level research markdown files and research write paths
outcome: success — found two causes: legacy intentional raw scrape source files committed at repo root on 2026-03-25, plus a real workspace-root routing bug fixed on 2026-03-31; current scrape_webpage output_file still writes bare workspace-relative paths to root
context: Evidence: commits f566718 and 00203ed added root research files intentionally with knowledge notes; commit a699dec fixed GSH_WORKSPACE_ROOTS propagation; current code in vscode-extension/src/mcp-server.js passes GSH_WORKSPACE_ROOTS, lib/mcp-research.js resolves knowledge root, but lib/mcp-web-search.js resolves output_file via path.resolve(WORKSPACE_ROOT, outputFile) with no knowledge-root guard.

action: implemented scrape_webpage guardrail against workspace-root markdown writes
outcome: success — bare output_file names now fail fast, explicit subdirectory paths still work, focused regression test added, full test suite passed 24/24
context: Updated lib/mcp-web-search.js, lib/mcp-research-tools.js, copilot-config/instructions/gsh-mcp-tools.instructions.md, and scripts/test-search-auto-scrape.js. Validated with node ./scripts/test-search-auto-scrape.js and bash ./scripts/test.sh.

action: archived legacy root research files into dedicated source-material directory
outcome: success — moved 13 raw research markdown files from repo root to research-sources/legacy-root-dumps, added README mapping them to curated knowledge notes, no live filename references found, full test suite passed 24/24
context: All inspected root research files were raw source dumps, not curated notes. No additional promotions into knowledge/ were needed because the canonical notes already existed there.

action: starting follow-up: explain git-research-mcp wrapper split and replace existing PR with a fresh one for rereview
context: Need explain why git-research-mcp and git-research-mcp.js both exist, determine current PR state, then create a fresh PR containing current changes so Copilot re-reviews. Must avoid clobbering unrelated local changes.
